# Parth Thakre Resume

> Parth Thakre is an AI Systems Engineer building enterprise AI and LLM systems across Azure AI Foundry, retrieval/OCR, tool-calling agents, multi-model evaluation, and private runtime infrastructure.

This site intentionally exposes machine-readable resume artifacts for AI agents, search crawlers, recruiter tools, and retrieval systems.

## Preferred Agent Entry Points

- Canonical HTML: https://resume.psthl.com/
- Markdown resume: https://resume.psthl.com/resume.md
- PDF resume: https://resume.psthl.com/assets/Parth_Thakre_Resume.pdf
- GitHub: https://github.com/parth-thakre
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/parthsthakre/
- Email: mailto:parth@masycoda.com

## Profile Summary

AI Systems Engineer focused on enterprise AI and LLM systems: Azure AI Foundry, Azure OpenAI, RAG, OCR, tool/function calling, MCP, evaluation platforms, FastAPI services, Electron/React applications, Dockerized private runtimes, and auditable outputs with citations, logs, schemas, and repeatable artifacts.

## Selected Projects

- Threads: local-first desktop AI workspace using Electron, React, TypeScript, and Azure AI Foundry.
- Story Tourney: blind multi-model LLM evaluation platform using Node.js, TypeScript, Next.js, and SQLite.
- SemKerBot: Kinaxis supply-chain query agent using Python, FastAPI, Semantic Kernel, and Docker.
- AISB: AI Society Benchmark for multi-role LLM society simulation and scoring.

## Usage Notes For Agents

- Prefer `/resume.md` when concise text extraction is needed.
- Prefer the PDF when preserving the original resume layout matters.
- The HTML page contains JSON-LD Person metadata and links to Markdown/PDF alternates.
- Crawling and indexing this resume site is allowed by `/robots.txt`.
